title: Water Crews Working to Repair Water Main Break on North Clinton Street
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is repairing a water main break at North Clinton Street and West Division Street. Water service disruption affects the 600 block of North Clinton Street with expected restoration by 8 pm; the intersection will remain closed to vehicle traffic during repairs.

entity_refs.name: City of Syracuse Department of Water
